themes.label: Suffering
themes.summary: This chapter deals with affliction, sorrow, trial, lament, endurance, or hardship. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 5 verses. Commentary leans on "Why standest thou afar off, O LORD? why hidest thou thyself in times of trouble? Psalm 10 con...". Word-study detail reinforces "בַּצָּרָֽה׃: of trouble - transitively, a female rival".

themes.label: Kingdom
themes.summary: This chapter stresses reign, kingdom, throne, rule, or the authority of God and His Christ. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 2 verses. Commentary leans on "This triumphant declaration affirms God's eternal kingship—'Yahweh is King forever and ever.'...". Cross references echo "Kingdom".
